extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Cortana listens to your voice when you enable voice mode, processed locally on this Mac.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Cortana uses automation to read and manage your Mail, Calendar, and Reminders on your behalf.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Cortana reads and creates calendar events when you ask.
extendInfo.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Cortana creates and completes reminders when you ask.
extendInfo.NSSystemAdministrationUsageDescription: Cortana adjusts system settings such as volume and brightness when you ask.
